title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.170 - Court shall include in its order, what
text:
236.170.  Court shall include in its order, what. — When the party petitioning prays for an acre of land whereon to abut his dam, the court shall include in its order, if the petition is granted, a judgment vesting the title of such acre of land in the party petitioning, his heirs and assigns forever.
(RSMo 1939 § 10302) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9173; 1919 § 7415; 1909 § 5472
